subject: Update APPC charts for Nitrogen ODL
commit_message:
Update APPC charts for Nitrogen ODL

SDNC directory renamed to ccsdk based on latest ccsdk update.
Files startODL.sh and appc.properties updated based on Nitrogen ODL.

Change-Id: I096ffb211afdd7df7438f5bb276ecc6b0fbfc09d
Issue-ID: OOM-951
Signed-off-by: Aaron Hay <ah415j@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

APPC startup became longish...
"Total Appc install took 930 seconds"

All bundles started successfully:
opendaylight-user@root>list | grep -v Active
START LEVEL 100 , List Threshold: 50
 ID | State    | Lvl | Version                             | Name
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 31 | Resolved |  80 | 4.0.10                              | Apache Karaf :: Diagnostic :: Boot
190 | Resolved |  80 | 0.7.1                               | config-persister-directory-xml-adapter, Hosts: 192
191 | Resolved |  80 | 0.7.1                               | config-persister-file-xml-adapter, Hosts: 192

I see some feature not installed:
opendaylight-user@root>feature:list  | grep appc | grep -v "\| x"
appc-event-listener                              | 1.3.0.SNAPSHOT   |          | Uninstalled | appc-event-listener-1.3.0-SNAPSHOT               | event listener
appc-ssh-adapter                                 | 1.3.0.SNAPSHOT   |          | Started     | appc-ssh-adapter-1.3.0-SNAPSHOT                  | appc-ssh-adapter
appc-dispatcher                                  | 1.3.0.SNAPSHOT   |          | Uninstalled | appc-dispatcher-1.3.0-SNAPSHOT                   | appc-dispatcher


Manually starting appc-dispatcher and appc-event-listener succeeded.
appc-ssh-adapter stays "Started", but without "x".
Does it look OK?



There is still this error during start:
 88% [===============================================================>        ]17:35:15.384 [Start Level: Equinox Container: d0233aa9-6542-0018-165e-978c3d441146] ERROR o.o.a.dao.util.dbcp.DBConnectionPool - Get connection failure

Would be nice if you could take care of it at some later date.

Patch Set 1:

> (1 comment)

The 60 seconds wait is copied from ccsdk which is where we inherit our opendaylight install from. When I have time, I plan to make a process check.

Patrick Brady provided the response below in the JIRA:

The appc-dispatcher feature should not be installed anymore. Its just an aggregator feature, the features that are part of it are being installed individually.
The appc-event-listener is set to not install by default for now because if no dmaap server is available is prevents opendaylight from restarting properly. When I have time, I am planning to change how the opendaylight restarts which might fix this.
Change has been successfully merged by Borislav Glozman
